name: Law and kid
description:
Main idea

Law swallowed his tongue piercing while in the middle of dishes and kid offered to help get it out

✨Having trouble coming up with ideas? ✨

Tell them to get back to work and stop goofing off on your ship (or Captain ship depending if your crewmate or not)

insist that you help considering you're not a human magnet 🧲
